front.title: Security Capability Coordination Execution Framework for 5G Core Networks

abstract.t: This document defines a security capability coordination execution framework for 5G core networks. The framework employs a set of Security Coordination Components (SCC) that work collaboratively with core network functions to achieve continuous trust verification and least-privilege access control. It specifies the division of responsibilities between the Network Function Security Agent and the Management Security Controller. This document aims to provide a standardized architecture reference for the ZT-CPP working group.
